metadata.purpose: Reviewable source data for the Wordloom-owned v1 core spelling bank, moving toward approximately 1,000 production words and including reviewed Phase 7B, Phase 7C, Phase 7D, and Phase 7E production batches.
notes: This file is a staged source moving toward the full approximate 1,000-word v1 production bank.
Phase 7A rows remain a review-only foundation sample unless explicitly selected by a later source_version.
Rows with source_version wordloom_core_v1_phase_7b_2026_05_13 are reviewed Wordloom-owned Phase 7B production batch content.
Rows with source_version wordloom_core_v1_phase_7c_2026_05_13 are reviewed Wordloom-owned Phase 7C production batch content for aw, ure, and active target top-ups.
Rows with source_version wordloom_core_v1_phase_7d_2026_05_13 are reviewed Wordloom-owned Phase 7D production proof-target top-up batch content.
Rows with source_version wordloom_core_v1_phase_7e_2026_05_13 are reviewed Wordloom-owned Phase 7E production bulk top-up batch content.
Production SQL is generated from this format after source review.
